page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software package to visualise the recombination signal in large DNA sequence dataset, and it can be used to analyse recombination, genetic introgression, hybridisation and horizontal gene transfer.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Software package to visualise the recombination signal in large DNA sequence dataset, and it can be used to analyse recombination, genetic introgression, hybridisation and horizontal gene transfer.
